_comment: Single source of truth for the gateway. Edit this, then run scripts/apply-config.sh (or redeploy). Dedicated gateway 'squidway' (192.168.50.1): it is a plain Wi-Fi CLIENT on an external hotspot (internet), NOT running its own AP — so hotspot-up.sh is not used and the hotspot block below is unused (kept only so status.sh can read wifi_iface). Each microscope is reached by its real backbone IP over the wired switch.
